chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.D- 99 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.04.2026. Mr. Aghis-us-Salam, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Shahiryar Shar, Special Prosecutor ANF. = Learned Special Prosecutor ANF claims the copy of bail application which has been provided to him by the counsel for applicants. At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicants does not wish to press this bail application and submits that he would be satisfied if directions are given to the learned trial Court to conclude the trial within a period of four months from the date of passing of this order. Learned Special Prosecutor ANF extends his no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, instant bail application is disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within a period of four months under intimation to this Court. In case of failure, the applicants would be at liberty to move a fresh bail application, as deemed fit. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
